novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 1
novelty_flags.one_line: tier=field below novelty_target=flagship; the proposal names adjacent continuous-DID papers but does not quote a published open problem or prove strict open-set improvement over DCDHK2026NoUntreated's no-quasi estimators.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 1
soundness_flags.one_line: It assumes Assumption nonempty but also claims falsification iff gap blocks are solvable; split feasibility from falsification or drop ass:nonempty for the falsification clause.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Add a flagship-grade comparison theorem target: state an open set of no-quasi/no-near-zero observable laws where the proposed interval is finite and strictly sharper than the fallback object in DCDHK2026NoUntreated, with the exact estimator/branch named.
Split Conjecture 1 into a nonempty-feasible sharp-envelope program and a separate falsification criterion that does not assume nonemptiness.
Make the finite program non-circular by replacing endpoint derivative cones defined through the full feasible class with explicit trace/Whitney inequalities or finite auxiliary variables.

recommended_next_step: Revise Conjecture 1 to remove the nonempty/falsification clash and add a strict published-frontier comparison strong enough to meet the flagship floor.
